content.text:
[cron:15028631-f68e-464d-980d-b71e15ab1c1a version save] run a sync to GitHub to save version history of this OpenClaw and all other programs and files
Current time: Saturday, May 9th, 2026 - 7:41 AM (America/Chicago) / 2026-05-09 12:41 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly with an explicit target. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.
I'll sync the workspace and key directories to GitHub. Let me check the current state of repos first.

arguments.command: cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace && git status --short 2>/dev/null && echo "---REMOTE---" && git remote -v 2>/dev/null
ls -d /Users/landonking/.openclaw/ 2>/dev/null && cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw && git status --short 2>/dev/null && echo "---REMOTE---" && git remote -v 2>/dev/null

content.text: Good — both repos are set up with GitHub remotes. Let me also check for other important project directories that should be synced.

arguments.command:
# Check for other git repos in common locations
for dir in /Users/landonking/Projects /Users/landonking/Development /Users/landonking/Code /Users/landonking/Documents; do
  if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | while read gitdir; do
      repo=$(dirname "$gitdir")
      remote=$(cd "$repo" && git remote -v 2>/dev/null | grep github | head -1)
      dirty=$(cd "$repo" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -3)
      if [ -n "$remote" ] || [ -n "$dirty" ]; then
        echo "REPO: $repo"
        echo "  REMOTE: $remote"
        [ -n "$dirty" ] && echo "  DIRTY: $dirty"
      fi
    done
  fi
done

# Check home directory for common project folders
ls -d /Users/landonking/*/ 2>/dev/null | head -20

# Check all git repos with GitHub remotes in key directories
for dir in /Users/landonking/VisionClaw /Users/landonking/VisionClaw.worktrees /Users/landonking/hermes-agent /Users/landonking/openclaw-army /Users/landonking/openclaw-army.worktrees /Users/landonking/obsidian-vault /Users/landonking/data; do
  if [ -d "$dir/.git" ]; then
    remote=$(cd "$dir" && git remote -v 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'github|gitlab|bitbucket' | head -1)
    dirty=$(cd "$dir" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    branch=$(cd "$dir" && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)
    echo "REPO: $dir (branch: $branch, dirty: $dirty files)"
    echo "  REMOTE: $remote"
  elif [ -d "$dir" ]; then
    # Check for worktrees or sub-repos
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 2 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | while read gitdir; do
      repo=$(dirname "$gitdir")
      remote=$(cd "$repo" && git remote -v 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'github|gitlab|bitbucket' | head -1)
      dirty=$(cd "$repo" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
      branch=$(cd "$repo" && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)
      echo "REPO: $repo (branch: $branch, dirty: $dirty files)"
      echo "  REMOTE: $remote"
    done
  fi
done

content.text: Now let me commit and push both OpenClaw repos. I'll start with the workspace and the main config repo.

arguments.command:
cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace && \
  git add -A && \
  git commit -m "auto-sync: workspace state $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%MZ)" 2>&1 | tail -5

cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw && \
  git add -A && \
  git commit -m "auto-sync: openclaw config + sessions $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%MZ)" 2>&1 | tail -5

content.text:
Hermes-agent just has an untracked subdir (local work), and openclaw-army is a clone of the upstream openclaw repo — those 69 untracked files are local agent directories, not stuff to push upstream. Those aren't appropriate to push (hermes is an upstream fork, openclaw-army is the openclaw source). The meaningful repos to sync are the two OpenClaw config/workspace repos, which are already pushed.

Let me also check if VisionClaw needs a push (it was clean, but let me verify):

VisionClaw is clean — already synced from a previous run. All done.

|------|--------|--------|

| `~/.openclaw` | `github.com/landonking-gif/openclaw` | ✅ pushed (10 files: sessions, cron state, config) |
| `~/VisionClaw` | `github.com/sseanliu/VisionClaw` | ✅ already clean |
| `~/hermes-agent` | upstream fork, no changes to push | — |
| `~/openclaw-army` | upstream clone, local-only agent dirs | — |
